scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,ui -c blue,green "pnpm --filter server dev" "pnpm --filter ui dev"
scripts.build: pnpm --filter @zerohand/db build && pnpm --filter server build && pnpm --filter ui build
scripts.db:reset: rm -rf server/.data/postgres && echo 'Database reset. Run pnpm dev to re-seed.'
